data.acceptance:
1. Claude Code approval request shapes used by Foolery are documented in tests and extracted into `FOOLERY APPROVAL REQUIRED` banners.
2. Foolery can launch a Claude Code approval-test session without `--dangerously-skip-permissions`.
3. Existing autonomous Claude sessions keep their current behavior unless configuration explicitly opts into approval testing.
4. Tests cover launch args for bypass and non-bypass modes plus approval extraction.
5. Lint and typecheck pass.
